techniques.evidence_quote: The attacker exploited CVE-2021-3129 in a Laravel application and a misconfiguration in WordPress to gain initial access to the cloud account.
the attacker used automated reconnaissance techniques to instantly uncover a lay of the land
They then used the privileges they identified for the compromised users

techniques.technique_name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Unix Shell
techniques.evidence_quote: The EC2 instances were created in the account using RunInstances with the following userdata... wget ... tar -zxf ... sudo ./service start meson_cdn
The userdata field allows for commands to be run when an EC2 instance starts.
The compromised account experienced malicious activity across many AWS regions... spawned multiple batches of 500 micro-sized instances per region
Within minutes, the attacker was able to spawn almost 6,000 instances inside the compromised account across multiple regions and execute the meson_cdn binary

attack_chain.description: Attacker exploited CVE-2021-3129 in a Laravel application and a WordPress misconfiguration on exposed honeynet services to gain initial access.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The attacker exploited CVE-2021-3129 in a Laravel application and a misconfiguration in WordPress to gain initial access to the cloud account.

attack_chain.description: Attacker ran automated reconnaissance to enumerate the cloud environment and identify privileges of the compromised users.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the attacker used automated reconnaissance techniques to instantly uncover a lay of the land

evidence_chunks.quote: the attacker used automated reconnaissance techniques to instantly uncover a lay of the land
the attacker used automated reconnaissance techniques to instantly uncover a lay of the land

attack_chain.description: Attacker operated across many AWS regions, launching batches of instances per region to evade detection and maximize resources.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The compromised account experienced malicious activity across many AWS regions.

evidence_chunks.quote: The compromised account experienced malicious activity across many AWS regions.
The compromised account experienced malicious activity across many AWS regions.

attack_chain.technique_name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Unix Shell
attack_chain.description: Attacker embedded shell commands in EC2 userdata to download and install the meson_cdn binary on instance boot.
Attacker called RunInstances in batches of 500 Ubuntu 22.04 micro instances per region, spawning nearly 6,000 EC2 instances to run Meson Network CDN nodes for token rewards.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Within minutes, the attacker was able to spawn almost 6,000 instances inside the compromised account across multiple regions and execute the meson_cdn binary.

evidence_chunks.quote: Within minutes, the attacker was able to spawn almost 6,000 instances inside the compromised account across multiple regions and execute the meson_cdn binary.
Within minutes, the attacker was able to spawn almost 6,000 instances inside the compromised account across multiple regions and execute the meson_cdn binary.

initial_access_vector: Exploitation of CVE-2021-3129 in an exposed Laravel application and a WordPress misconfiguration on honeynet infrastructure, which yielded AWS credentials/access to the cloud account.
persistence_mechanism: None explicitly described; attacker leveraged existing compromised user privileges to run EC2 instances.
privilege_escalation: None observed; attacker reused privileges already granted to compromised users.
